command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.203 '
echo === SETUP POST-REBOOT RESIZE ===

# Create a systemd oneshot service to resize2fs on next boot
sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/resize-root.service > /dev/null << EOF
[Unit]
Description=Resize root filesystem to fill partition
After=local-fs.target
Before=network.target
ConditionPathExists=/etc/resize-root-pending

[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/sbin/resize2fs /dev/sda2
ExecStartPost=/bin/rm -f /etc/resize-root-pending
ExecStartPost=/sbin/swapoff -a
ExecStartPost=/bin/fallocate -l 4G /swapfile
ExecStartPost=/bin/chmod 600 /swapfile
ExecStartPost=/sbin/mkswap /swapfile
ExecStartPost=/sbin/swapon /swapfile
RemainAfterExit=yes

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF

sudo touch /etc/resize-root-pending
sudo systemctl enable resize-root.service
echo RESIZE_SERVICE_CREATED

echo === REMOVING OLD SWAP FROM FSTAB ===
sudo sed -i "/UUID.*swap/d" /etc/fstab
sudo sed -i "/dev.*sda3/d" /etc/fstab
grep swap /etc/fstab || echo NO_SWAP_IN_FSTAB

echo REBOOTING_NOW
sudo reboot
' 2>&1 || true
